heading: Disclosure of information
label: 4019 Disclosure of information
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Oct. 8, 1982section 312 of Pub. L. 97–290section 4011 of this title

children.heading: Exemption
children.label: a Exemption
children.text: Information submitted by any person in connection with the issuance, amendment, or revocation of a certificate of review shall be exempt from disclosure under .section 552 of title 5

children.heading: Protection of potentially harmful confidential information; exceptions: Congress; judicial or administrative proceedings; consent; necessity for determination; Federal law; regulations
children.label: b Protection of potentially harmful confidential information; exceptions: Congress; judicial or administrative proceedings; consent; necessity for determination; Federal law; regulations

children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), no officer or employee of the United States shall disclose commercial or financial information submitted in connection with the issuance, amendment, or revocation of a certificate of review if the information is privileged or confidential and if disclosure of the information would cause harm to the person who submitted the information.

children.label: A
children.text: upon a request made by the Congress or any committee of the Congress,

children.label: B
children.text: in a judicial or administrative proceeding, subject to appropriate protective orders,

children.label: C
children.text: with the consent of the person who submitted the information,

children.label: D
children.text: in the course of making a determination with respect to the issuance, amendment, or revocation of a certificate of review, if the Secretary deems disclosure of the information to be necessary in connection with making the determination,

children.label: E
children.text: in accordance with any requirement imposed by a statute of the United States, or

children.label: F
children.text: in accordance with any rule or regulation promulgated under permitting the disclosure of the information to an agency of the United States or of a State on the condition that the agency will disclose the information only under the circumstances specified in subparagraphs (A) through (E).section 4020 of this title
